---
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document:
    toc: false
    paged: false
header-includes: \usepackage{fontspec, pdfpages, graphicx} \setmainfont{Times New Roman} \pagestyle{empty}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(igraph)
library(ggraph)
library(marray)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)

```

```{r}

source(here("src/helpers_exposure-modifier.R"))
source(here("src/epimods_functions.R"))

parse_means <- function(pheno_dat, gene_meth, epimod_genes){
  dat <-gene_meth %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene_primary %in% epimod_genes)  %>%# filter out epimod genes
    column_to_rownames(var = "gene_primary") %>%
    dplyr::select(-n_cpg) %>%
    t() %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "basename") 
  dat <- dplyr::left_join(pheno_dat, dat, by = "basename")
  return(dat)
}

# Pheno #----
load(here("data/pheno.Rdata"))

pheno_sub <- droplevels(pheno[pheno$Experiment=='exp5' & pheno$Tissue.type %in% c('Breast'),])

# Reformat for 2x2x2 design, and diet groups for raw plots
dat <- pheno_sub %>%
  mutate(
    exposure      = factor(ifelse(grepl("\\bMPA/DMBA\\+", Treatment), 1, 0),
                           levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("P/D-", "P/D+")),
    keto          = factor(ifelse(grepl("\\bKD\\+",       Treatment), 1, 0),
                           levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("KD-", "KD+")),
    mifepristone  = factor(ifelse(grepl("\\bMIF\\+",      Treatment), 1, 0),
                           levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("MIF-", "MIF+"))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    diet4 = factor(
      paste0(keto, " ", mifepristone),
      levels = c("KD- MIF-",  "KD+ MIF-", "KD- MIF+", "KD+ MIF+")
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(basename,exposure,keto,mifepristone,diet4)

pc_scores <- readRDS(here("results/analysis2_celltype_adj/2-output/celltype_pc_scores.Rds"))
dat <- full_join(dat, pc_scores[,1:5])
covars <- colnames(pc_scores[,1:5])[-1]

# Epimod info #----
load(here("results/analysis2_celltype_adj/12-output/epimods_promoter.Rdata"))
out_epimod_prom <- out
load(here("results/analysis2_celltype_adj/12-output/epimods_genebody.Rdata"))
out_epimod_body <- out
rm(out);invisible(gc())
 
annot <- readRDS(here("results/0-output/anno2_genes_filtered.Rds"))

id2symbol <- setNames(
  annot$gene_primary,
  annot$ENTREZID
)

# gene summaries bulk #-----

gene_meth_prom <- readRDS(here("results/analysis2_celltype_adj/6-output/island_breast_genemeanmeth_promoters.Rds"))
gene_meth_body <- readRDS(here("results/analysis2_celltype_adj/6-output/island_breast_genemeanmeth_genebody.Rds"))

# gene summaries cell type compartments #-----

gene_met_epi_prom <- readRDS(here("results/analysis3_tensor/1-output/base_epi_genemeanmeth_promoters.Rds"))
gene_met_imm_prom <- readRDS(here("results/analysis3_tensor/1-output/base_imm_genemeanmeth_promoters.Rds"))
gene_met_stro_prom <- readRDS(here("results/analysis3_tensor/1-output/base_stro_genemeanmeth_promoters.Rds"))
gene_met_epi_body <- readRDS(here("results/analysis3_tensor/1-output/base_epi_genemeanmeth_genebody.Rds"))
gene_met_imm_body <- readRDS(here("results/analysis3_tensor/1-output/base_imm_genemeanmeth_genebody.Rds"))
gene_met_stro_body <- readRDS(here("results/analysis3_tensor/1-output/base_stro_genemeanmeth_genebody.Rds"))

```

```{r}

p1 <- plot_fdr_genecount(out_epimod_prom, id2symbol, "pCGIs")
p2 <- plot_fdr_genecount(out_epimod_body, id2symbol, "oCGIs")

p1_grob <- ggplotify::as.grob(p1) 
p2_grob <- ggplotify::as.grob(p2) 

```

```{r}

set.seed(321)

# e.g. cancer modules affected by KD
sig.mods <- out_epimod_prom[[3]] # 12 modules
weight.g <- out_epimod_prom[[5]]
pval.v <- out_epimod_prom[[6]]
stat.v <- out_epimod_prom[[7]]

# Global limits based on nodes/edges of g that will be plotted
mods_to_plot <- c(2, 3, 6)
nodes_keep <- unique(unlist(sig.mods[mods_to_plot]))
g_sub <- induced_subgraph(weight.g, vids = nodes_keep)

# Global limits for vertex color (use all nodes of g that will be plotted)
sl_sub <- sign(stat.v[nodes_keep]) * -log10(pval.v[nodes_keep])

sl_limits <- c(-max(abs(sl_sub), na.rm = TRUE),
                max(abs(sl_sub), na.rm = TRUE))

# Global limits for edge weights (use all edges of g that will be plotted)
w_limits <- range(abs(E(g_sub)$weight), na.rm = TRUE)
w_all <- abs(E(g_sub)$weight)
w_breaks <- as.numeric(quantile(w_all, c(0.1, 0.5, 0.9), na.rm = TRUE))

pa <- renderModule_gg(
  sig.mods[[2]],
  weight.g,
  pval.v,
  stat.v,
  vertex_cols = c("#4575b4", "#d73027", mid = "white"),
  k = 50,
  id2symbol = id2symbol,
  use_symbols = TRUE,
  sl_limits = sl_limits,
  w_limits = w_limits,
  w_breaks  = w_breaks,
  edge_width_range = c(0.3, 2),
  edge_use_abs = TRUE,
  show_legends = TRUE
)

pb <- renderModule_gg(sig.mods[[3]],
  weight.g,
  pval.v,
  stat.v,
  vertex_cols = c("#4575b4", "#d73027", mid = "white"),
  k = 50,
  id2symbol = id2symbol,
  use_symbols = TRUE,
  sl_limits = sl_limits,
  w_limits = w_limits,
  w_breaks  = w_breaks,
  edge_width_range = c(0.3, 2),
  edge_use_abs = TRUE,
  show_legends = TRUE)
pc <- renderModule_gg(sig.mods[[6]],
  weight.g,
  pval.v,
  stat.v,
  vertex_cols = c("#4575b4", "#d73027", mid = "white"),
  k = 50,
  id2symbol = id2symbol,
  use_symbols = TRUE,
  sl_limits = sl_limits,
  w_limits = w_limits,
  w_breaks  = w_breaks,
  edge_width_range = c(0.3, 2),
  edge_use_abs = TRUE,
  show_legends = TRUE)

p5 <- pa + pb + pc + plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = c(1.5,1,1))
p5_grob <- ggplotify::as.grob(p5) 


```

```{r}

set.seed(213)

# Top cancer modules
sig.mods <- out_epimod_body[[3]] # 12 modules
weight.g <- out_epimod_body[[5]]
pval.v <- out_epimod_body[[6]]
stat.v <- out_epimod_body[[7]]

# Global limits based on nodes/edges of g that will be plotted
mods_to_plot <- c(1,2,4)
nodes_keep <- unique(unlist(sig.mods[mods_to_plot]))
g_sub <- induced_subgraph(weight.g, vids = nodes_keep)

# Global limits for vertex color (use all nodes of g that will be plotted)
sl_sub <- sign(stat.v[nodes_keep]) * -log10(pval.v[nodes_keep])

sl_limits <- c(-max(abs(sl_sub), na.rm = TRUE),
                max(abs(sl_sub), na.rm = TRUE))

# Global limits for edge weights (use all edges of g that will be plotted)
w_limits <- range(abs(E(g_sub)$weight), na.rm = TRUE)
w_all <- abs(E(g_sub)$weight)
w_breaks <- as.numeric(quantile(w_all, c(0.1, 0.5, 0.9), na.rm = TRUE))

pa <- renderModule_gg(
  sig.mods[[1]],
  weight.g,
  pval.v,
  stat.v,
  vertex_cols = c("#4575b4", "#d73027", mid = "white"),
  k = 50,
  id2symbol = id2symbol,
  use_symbols = TRUE,
  sl_limits = sl_limits,
  w_limits = w_limits,
  w_breaks  = w_breaks,
  edge_width_range = c(0.3, 2),
  edge_use_abs = TRUE,
  show_legends = TRUE
)

pb <- renderModule_gg(
  sig.mods[[4]],
  weight.g,
  pval.v,
  stat.v,
  vertex_cols = c("#4575b4", "#d73027", mid = "white"),
  k = 50,
  id2symbol = id2symbol,
  use_symbols = TRUE,
  sl_limits = sl_limits,
  w_limits = w_limits,
  w_breaks  = w_breaks,
  edge_width_range = c(0.3, 2),
  edge_use_abs = TRUE,
  show_legends = TRUE
)

pc <- renderModule_gg(
  sig.mods[[2]],
  weight.g,
  pval.v,
  stat.v,
  vertex_cols = c("#4575b4", "#d73027", mid = "white"),
  k = 50,
  id2symbol = id2symbol,
  use_symbols = TRUE,
  sl_limits = sl_limits,
  w_limits = w_limits,
  w_breaks  = w_breaks,
  edge_width_range = c(0.3, 2),
  edge_use_abs = TRUE,
  show_legends = TRUE
)

p6 <- pa + pb + pc + plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = c(1.5,1,1))
p6_grob <- ggplotify::as.grob(p6) 

```

```{r, fig.height=15, fig.width=16}


# combine plots #----
invisible(grid.arrange(
  grobs = list(
    arrangeGrob(p1_grob, top = textGrob(
      "a",
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"),
      x = unit(0, "npc"),
      hjust = 0
    )),
    arrangeGrob(p2_grob, top = textGrob(
      "b",
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"),
      x = unit(0, "npc"),
      hjust = 0
    )),
    arrangeGrob(p5_grob, top = textGrob(
      "c pCGIs, example EpiMods",
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"),
      x = unit(0, "npc"),
      hjust = 0
    )),
    arrangeGrob(p6_grob, top = textGrob(
      "d oCGIs, example EpiMods",
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"),
      x = unit(0, "npc"),
      hjust = 0
    ))
  ),
  layout_matrix = rbind(c(1,2),
                        c(NA,NA),
                        c(3,3),
                        c(NA,NA),
                        c(4,4)),
  heights = c(4,0.5,4,0.5,4)
))
```
